channel.title: Ai-Native on Ned Dwyer
channel.description: Recent content in Ai-Native on Ned Dwyer

item.title: Inject the AI straight into my veins.
item.description: If you want to fast-track your way to being a state-of-the-art AI-first team, the best thing you can be doing is bringing in AI-pilled guest speakers to indoctrinate your team.
